work_authorisation_routes.name: Skilled Worker Visa
eligibility_criteria: Job offer from a UK Home Office-licensed sponsor
Role must appear on the eligible occupation list (SOC code)
Salary meets the general threshold of £38,700 or the going rate, whichever is higher
English language at B1 level or above

work_authorisation_routes.name: Global Talent Visa
eligibility_criteria: Endorsement from Tech Nation or another approved endorsing body
Demonstrated exceptional talent or exceptional promise in digital technology
No salary minimum, but strong portfolio evidence is required

required_qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent demonstrable experience
5+ years of professional backend development experience
language_requirements: English B1 minimum (CEFR) required for Skilled Worker Visa
Approved tests include IELTS, TOEFL iBT, and PTE Academic
credentials.degree_equivalency_notes: UK ENIC provides official degree comparability statements for overseas qualifications. Most international CS degrees are recognised. Experience-based equivalency is accepted for the Skilled Worker Visa route if 5+ years are demonstrated.

market_demand.notes: London remains a top European tech hub with very high demand for senior backend engineers. Manchester and Edinburgh also show strong demand. Fintech, healthtech, and e-commerce sectors are particularly active.
